name: Decision Matrix Bases View

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description: Fix for too-narrow weight input fields on mobile devices.

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description:
- Remove "Obsidian" from plugin description
- Replace `builtin-modules` with Node.js built-in `builtinModules`
- CSS: remove all `!important`, fix duplicate selectors, fix 3-digit hex colors
- Add GitHub Actions release workflow with artifact attestations for main.js, manifest.json, styles.css
releases.name: 0.7.2: community plugin compliance

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description:
- Remove "Obsidian" from plugin description (community plugin standard)
- Add MIT license file
releases.name: 0.7.1: community plugin compliance fixes

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Unified toolbar** — both Decision Matrix and Rankings views now share the same toolbar (Scale selector, Reload weights, Fold Cols, Normalize)
- **Rankings view parity** — Rankings view gains Scale dropdown and Normalize button
- **Per-column Rank Raws in Rankings** — replaces the old all-columns toggle; checkboxes now live in the weighted table header in both views
- **Code cleanup** — shared `DecisionMatrixBaseView` base class eliminates duplicated weight logic; `renderToolbar` and `normalizeScores` extracted to shared renderer module
- **Example notes** — real price data for `cost`, negative `weight_cost`, Laptop Decision note co-located in the examples folder, Rankings view included in the base file
releases.name: 0.7.0: shared toolbar & Rankings view parity

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description:
## What's new

### Per-column Rank Raws
The global **Rank Raws** toolbar button has been replaced with individual checkboxes — one above each criterion column in the Raw Scores table.

- Toggle ranking independently per criterion
- Ranked value shown prominently in the cell; raw score displayed below in small text for reference
- Weighted table uses ranked values only for checked columns
- Normalize button still disables when any rank raws column is active
- Editing a raw score in a ranked cell correctly restores the rank display on close
releases.name: v0.6.0 — Per-column Rank Raws

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Conditional vertical headers** — criterion headers are horizontal by default and only rotate vertical when the table overflows its container
- **Fold Cols** — now hides the Raw Scores table entirely; Weighted Scores table slims to Item / W.A. / Rank
- **Normalize confirmation** — a confirm dialog warns before overwriting raw scores
- **Score cell overflow fix** — numbers in score cells now have a minimum width and never wrap
releases.name: v0.5.0

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description:
## What's new

**Rank Raws** — a new toggle on both the Matrix and Rankings views that normalizes each criterion's raw scores into competition ranks before weighted scoring. Useful when criteria are on incompatible scales (e.g. price in dollars vs. quality 1–10).

- Rank column ("N") shown after each score column in the raw table when active
- Weighted table and rankings use ranks instead of raw values
- Decimal score inputs allowed when Rank Raws is on
- Normalize button disabled while Rank Raws is active (they conflict)

## Bug fixes

- Fixed "no numeric score properties found" error when a base has multiple views configured
releases.name: v0.4.0 — Rank Raws

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description:
## What's new

### Rankings view polish
- Animated bar fill on load
- Podium entrance stagger (2nd → 3rd → 1st)
- Per-row fade-in stagger on list items
- Gold shimmer loop on #1 badge
- Card hover: lift + shadow + badge scale
- List item hover: lift + accent border tint
- Fallback cover icon when no URL is set
- Tighter squircle badges with `#N` format, larger cover images, bigger titles

### UX
- Ctrl/Cmd+click opens notes in a new tab (both matrix and rankings views)
- Blank scores for unset properties — explicit `0` is preserved as a deliberate judgment
releases.name: v0.3.0

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Rankings view** — new `decision-matrix-rankings` view type: podium (2nd/1st/3rd) + 2-column ranked card list with cover image support and relative score bars
- **Row grouping** — collapsible group headers using Bases native grouping
- **Score prefix stripping** — settings option to strip a prefix (e.g. `score_`) from display names
- **Blank vs. zero** — unset scores show blank; explicit 0 is preserved as a deliberate judgment
- **W.A. tooltip** — weighted average column now shows formula on hover
- **Compact weight inputs** + faint vertical column dividers
releases.name: v0.2.0

releases.author: bubba8587
releases.description:
Initial release.

## Installation

Download `main.js`, `styles.css`, and `manifest.json` and place them in `.obsidian/plugins/decision-matrix-bases-view/` in your vault.

## What's included

- Weighted decision matrix custom Bases view
- Inline editable raw scores (written to frontmatter)
- Weighted scores table with rank highlights and tie detection
- Weight pre-fill from embedding note `weight_*` frontmatter
- Per-criterion normalization
- Negative weight support
- Scale toggle (/5, /10, /100)
releases.name: v0.1.0
